---
role: exercise

chapter: "7"
section: "7"
exercise_number: 3
---

Show that the category of small categories and functors has small colimits.

*Hint:* Use Corollary 7.11 with $E$ the class of all functors $H: \mathcal{A} \rightarrow \mathcal{B}$ such that $\mathcal{B}$ is the subcategory generated by the set of morphisms of the form $fH$.
